name: P90 | 沙漠涂装
collection: 炙热沙城 II 收藏品
collectionZh: 炙热沙城 II 收藏品
descriptionEn: Easily recognizable for its unique bullpup design, the P90 is a great weapon to shoot on the move due to its high-capacity magazine and low recoil. It has been spray-painted freehand with short, thick lines in contrasting colors. Perfect for the insurgent on the go
descriptionZh: 因其独特的无托设计而更加容易辨认，多亏了 P90 高容量的弹匣和低后坐力，这把武器非常适合边移动边射击。 这把武器的喷漆采用徒手绘制，线条短粗，对比色彩鲜明。 活跃叛乱者的称手武器
